name: Effect of mTOR Inhibition and Other Metabolism Modulating Interventions on the Elderly: Rapa and cMRI Substudy
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov completed 20-participant phase 2 single-group rapamycin substudy in adults aged 70 to 95, testing 1 mg daily rapamycin for eight weeks with cardiac MRI systolic, diastolic, aortic-area, and aortic-distensibility endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
authors: The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio
